heading: Questions founders ask before they incorporate.

where.a: That's exactly what Gabriella answers. The recommender ranks 79 jurisdictions against your tax exposure, banking options and investor expectations — free, in two minutes.

residency.q: Do I have to live in the country I incorporate in?
residency.a: Almost never. Most of our jurisdictions allow 100% remote, non-resident setup. Where local substance or a resident director is required, we provide it.

banking.q: Can you actually get me a bank account?
banking.a: We make introductions to Mercury, Wise, Revolut and local partners, matched to a jurisdiction they'll onboard. Your country of incorporation — not where you live — decides who'll bank you.

cost.q: What does it really cost — all in?
cost.a: You see government fees, our fee and recurring annual costs itemised before you commit. No generic tiers, no surprise renewals.

move.q: Can I move my company later if I get it wrong?
move.a: Yes, but re-domiciliation is a five-figure cross-border project. The recommender exists so you don't have to.

who.a: Licensed corporate service providers and regulated professionals in each jurisdiction, all with professional indemnity. CorpSec coordinates and gives you one dashboard.
